title: Igor's 3D Grass Blocks
description: Modifies the grass block to use a custom model that extends the grass block sides outwards. Compatible with most texture packs.
body:
# About

This pack sets the grass block to have the grass parts of the sides extend outwards instead of being flat on the sides. They use the default textures making it compatible with texture packs that override grass block textures.

**Note that this pack requires the fabric mod Sodium, as it uses a different rendering system that stops the custom model from being shaded incorrectly.**


<details>
<summary>Comparison images between Sodium and vanilla</summary>

The below image is the pack with Sodium installed:
![3D grass blades that match bright green forest grass colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b217868b5a0bc63cd5520f477be2139674607a1.png)

The below image is the pack **without** Sodium installed:
![Dark green colors that don't match the bright green forest grass.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fdc8abfb25f061630ce973fb243c0f7f13b7032.png)
_Note that falling leaves are not included in the pack :)_
</details>


## How do I use this with other packs?

You will want to apply this above any texture pack that modifies grass blocks. I cannot guarantee that every pack will work with mine, but it does support a UV spread across the length of a full block on each side incase the grass side texture goes further down than the vanilla one.

<details>
<summary>Order of Texture Packs</summary>

![Order of texture packs (3D grass goes above other grass texture packs)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f05c0ef010230a337476860b93b99e6b9e3a9b8_0.webp)

</details>
